## bd tag

Add a label to an issue.

Shorthand for 'bd update &lt;id&gt; --add-label &lt;label&gt;'.

Examples:
  bd tag bd-123 bug
  bd tag bd-123 needs-review

```
bd tag <id> <label> [flags]
```
